title: SpellBinding
description: This Minecraft mod allows players to easily make their own enchanted books!
body:
**Enchanted Book Splitter Mod**

This mod allows the player to split an enchanted book into multiple pages, each of which can then be combined once again to make a better/custom enchanted book.

**To get the enchanted pages:**
1. Right-click on any enchanted book!
2. ??? That's it

**To then make an enchanted book from those pages:**
1. Click on any page with a piece of leather (make sure you have room in your inventory).
2. You will receive an enchanted book.

**To add enchantments to an enchanted book:**
1. Click on any enchanted book with an enchanted page to add that enchantment to it!
